meta.methodology: Heuristic scoring based on publicly available platform documentation and capability assessments
meta.disclaimer: Scores are indicative. Validate against your organisation's specific requirements and procurement facts.

platforms.name: Google Vertex AI
strengths: Native Gemini model family with multimodal capabilities
Tight BigQuery integration for analytics and feature engineering
Managed vector search with low-latency retrieval
Best-in-class model evaluation and experiment tracking
Vertex AI Agent Builder for rapid agent prototyping
Unified ML platform from training to serving
Strong Kubernetes ecosystem via GKE for custom workloads
weaknesses: Smaller enterprise footprint than Azure in regulated industries
Fewer pre-built enterprise connectors compared to Microsoft ecosystem
Less entrenched in legacy enterprise procurement channels

platforms.name: Azure OpenAI
strengths: Deepest enterprise integration via Microsoft 365 and Azure AD
Industry-leading compliance certifications for regulated sectors
Content safety and responsible AI guardrails built-in
Azure AI Search with hybrid retrieval capabilities
Strong enterprise procurement and support channels
Seamless Active Directory and identity integration
Copilot Studio for low-code agent building
weaknesses: Less flexibility for model experimentation outside OpenAI family
Azure AI Search can be expensive at scale
Vendor lock-in to Microsoft ecosystem is significant
Model evaluation tooling less mature than Vertex AI

platforms.name: AWS Bedrock
strengths: Broadest model marketplace with Claude, Llama, Mistral, Titan, and more
Deep AWS infrastructure control and customization
Strong IAM and VPC integration for security
Bedrock Agents for workflow orchestration
SageMaker integration for custom model training
Largest cloud infrastructure footprint globally
Knowledge Bases for managed RAG pipelines
weaknesses: Developer UX more fragmented across multiple services
Tooling spread across Bedrock, SageMaker, and other services
Model evaluation and experiment tracking less unified
Cost predictability harder due to service sprawl
platforms.pricing_model: Pay-per-token with on-demand and provisioned throughput
